news.t: Pacer Advisors Announces PTNQ Moving to Nasdaq Stock Market

holdings.infoBox: PTNQ is an equity ETF with a total of 101 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 8.11%, Apple at 6.96%, Micron Technology at 4.96%, Microsoft at 4.72%, and Amazon.com at 4.17%.

overview.description: The Pacer Trendpilot 100 ETF (PTNQ) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Pacer NASDAQ-100 Trendpilot index. The fund tracks an index that holds the NASDAQ-100 securities and/or 3-month US T-bills according to momentum. PTNQ was launched on Jun 11, 2015 and is issued by Pacer.

data.title: Pacer Advisors Announces PTNQ Moving to Nasdaq Stock Market
data.text: Pacer Advisors, Inc. (“Pacer”) announces plans to transfer the listing of Pacer Trendpilot® 100 ETF (PTNQ), an exchanged-traded fund (“ETF”), managed by Pacer from Cboe BZX Exchange, Inc. to The Nasda...
